data.title: Create approach-decision-maker agent definition with 5-dimension evaluation prompt
data.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md — the dedicated agent definition for evaluating implementation proposals.

**Frontmatter**:
- name: approach-decision-maker
- model: opus
- description: Evaluates implementation proposals against 5 quality dimensions and returns ADR-style selection rationale or counter-proposal
- tools: [Read, Grep, Glob]

**Content sections**:
1. **Purpose**: Evaluate structured implementation proposals for a story, select the best approach or counter-propose
2. **5 Evaluation Dimensions**: codebase alignment, blast radius, testability, simplicity, robustness — each with scoring criteria
3. **Context Hierarchy**: Epic success criteria = non-negotiable, Story done definitions = acceptance criteria, Story considerations = advisory
4. **Anti-Pattern Detection**: Flag golden hammer, premature abstraction, cargo cult, resume-driven development, premature optimization, not-invented-here when detected
5. **Output Format**: Two modes:
   - Selection: ADR-style rationale (Context, Decision, Consequences) with selected_proposal_index
   - Counter-proposal: alternative approach satisfying same done definitions, with rationale
   Follow contract at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md
6. **Nesting Prohibition**: Read, Grep, Glob tools are ALLOWED. Task tool dispatches are PROHIBITED. Must not dispatch sub-agents.
7. **Timeout**: Must set timeout: 600000 on dispatch. Apply context-budget cap for large stories.

**TDD**: GREEN — RED tests from Task e965-7119 pass after this file is created. Remove RED markers from .test-index.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md (create)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-approach-decision-maker-agent.sh
- [ ] Agent file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md
- [ ] Frontmatter has model: opus
  Verify: head -10 plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md | grep -q "model: opus"
- [ ] Contains all 5 evaluation dimensions
  Verify: grep -q "codebase alignment" plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md && grep -q "blast radius" plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md && grep -q "testability" plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md
- [ ] Contains nesting prohibition naming Task as prohibited
  Verify: grep -qi "task.*prohibit\|prohibit.*task\|NOT.*dispatch\|dispatch.*NOT" plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md
- [ ] RED markers removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q "\[test_agent_file_exists\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
